title: DrMob
description: DelaRosa Mobs adds DrPig, a cute pig-like creature inspired by Hytale and adapted to Minecraft with custom animations and behaviors. DrPig is the first mob in a planned collection.
body:
# DelaRosa Mobs 
Adds a new collection of high-quality, animated creatures inspired by Hytale, carefully adapted to fit naturally into Minecraft.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XO4RorMTLPs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This project starts with DrPig — the first mob in the collection (Mob #1) — featuring custom animations, personality-driven behaviors, and small details that make it feel alive in the world.

## DrPig (Hytale-inspired Mob)
DrPig is a friendly pig-like creature with a full animation set and several unique behaviors:

## Core behaviors
Day/Night routine
DrPig is active during the day.

At night, it can lay down and then sleep until morning.
It can wake up if it becomes daytime or if a player gets very close.
Breeding
DrPig can breed like a vanilla passive mob (using carrots).

## Player interaction
DrPig can act curious and approach players in a calm way.
It reacts to carrots and can perform small idle behaviors when relaxed.
Animation features

## Sleeping cycle
Plays a lay down transition once, then stays in a looping sleep animation.

## Music dancing
If a nearby jukebox is playing, DrPig can dance.

## Shake after water
After leaving water, DrPig performs a shake animation (once) to “dry off”.
Idle personality
Includes calm idle actions like sniffing/eating behaviors depending on the situation.
Compatibility / Notes

Designed for a smooth vanilla-friendly experience with custom animations and AI.
Client + server friendly (works in singleplayer and multiplayer).
This is only the beginning: more Hytale-inspired mobs are planned for future updates.
